author: conductor
title: Long StructuredOutput payloads lose parameters in transport — never schema-require what a hat can lose
trigger: Designing any Workflow agent({schema}) output shape, or debugging an agent that dies on 'StructuredOutput retry cap exceeded' / 'must have required property X' when the transcript shows the field WAS emitted.
guidance: The platform's StructuredOutput transport mis-parses long tool-call payloads (observed CC 2.1.215, council run wf_fefe782d-698, 3 of 16 agents lost): parameters after the first fuse into the first string value as literal parameter markup, or the whole input lands as truncated __unparsedToolInput. Failure probability correlates with multi-KB string parameters. Design rule: (1) require ONLY the fields the consumer cannot proceed without; (2) normalize optional fields with code-side defaults after agent() returns; (3) put an explicit length discipline in the agent prompt (~3500 chars per big string field); (4) when diagnosing, read the agent transcript's failed tool_use input — the content usually survives there and can be hand-recovered.
wrong_way: HAT_SCHEMA with required: [color, position, cited_record_ids, cited_files, research_needed] plus unbounded position length — a hat that wrote a thorough multi-KB position lost its whole round when the transport fused its citation fields into the position string and validation demanded them.
right_way: required: [color, position]; normHat() supplies [] for absent arrays; prompts carry the 3500-char cap; blue's COUNCIL_SCHEMA requires only summary+interview_agenda+advisory_lean with defaults for the rest (commit fa3ac54).
source_evidence: Council run wf_fefe782d-698 (2026-07-19): black r1 transcript agent-aa980279cc15b7f5d.jsonl (parameter markup leaked into position string, two failed validations); white r2 agent-ad8646e73bac3859b.jsonl (__unparsedToolInput, raw truncated at len 5093); blue agent-a782ba8d5cdaec015.jsonl (self-diagnosis 'Only the first parameter is registering regardless of size', 8 required fields read missing). Board 99b0c04d; fix commit fa3ac54 merged 0562579.
